URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/
# Beacon Hill Career Training
> Online provider of affordable, self-paced healthcare certificate and continuing education training programs that help individuals develop skills and earn credentials for in-demand roles in the healthcare field.
> This file lists LLM-ready summaries of our pages, including short Q&A for context.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/behavioral-health-technician
## Behavioral Health Technician
- Behavioral Health Technician. Offering a 30-hour online certificate training program that prepares individuals with entry-level skills to assist counselors and therapeutic staff in behavioral health and substance use treatment settings.
- **Q:** What credential does someone earn after completing the training?
- **A:** After completing the course, students earn a Behavioral Health Technician certificate from Beacon Hill Career Training.
- **Q:** What kinds of skills can someone expect to gain from the Behavioral Health Technician course?
- **A:** At Beacon Hill Career Training, the training covers skills like building positive relationships with people receiving care, documenting treatment progress, ensuring safety, and using intervention techniques in mental health and substance use settings.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/medication-technician
## Medication Technician Training
- Medication Technician Training. Offering an online training program that teaches safe medication administration practices and prepares learners to earn a nationally recognized certificate for entry-level medication tech roles in various healthcare settings.
- **Q:** What type of training program is the medication technician training?
- **A:** It’s a 6-hour online training program at Beacon Hill Career Training, designed to teach safe medication administration and help learners prepare for medication tech work under nursing supervision.
- **Q:** What will a student learn in this course?
- **A:** At Beacon Hill Career Training’s program, students will learn how to safely administer medications via multiple routes, understand safe storage and documentation, complete MARs accurately, and demonstrate the “six rights” of medication administration.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/restorative-aide
## Restorative Aide Training
- Restorative Aide Training. Providing a certificate training program that teaches skills to help residents improve or maintain functional independence in long-term care, rehab, and similar healthcare settings.
- **Q:** What credential does someone earn after finishing Restorative Aide training?
- **A:** After completing the course requirements, learners receive a Restorative Aide certificate they can print from Beacon Hill Career Training.
- **Q:** Who is the Restorative Aide course designed for?
- **A:** Beacon Hill Career Training, course is designed for nursing home personnel, medical assistants, licensed practical nurses, and other healthcare workers interested in restorative care skills.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/self
## Assist with Self Medication Course
- Assist with Self Medication Course. Offering a 2-hour online training course that teaches healthcare workers how to safely support and monitor patients who self-administer medications in assisted living and similar care settings.
- **Q:** What is the focus of this course?
- **A:** Beacon Hill Career Training’s Assist with Self-Medication course focuses on teaching healthcare providers how to safely assist and monitor patients who are capable of self-administering their medications.
- **Q:** How long does the training take to complete?
- **A:** The course includes 2 hours of online training and must be completed within 30 days of enrollment through Beacon Hill Career Training.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/crisis-prevention-intervention
## CPI Course Online Training
- CPI Course Online Training. Offering an online training program that teaches nonviolent crisis management, de-escalation techniques, and personal safety skills to help individuals respond effectively to challenging situations in various professional settings.
- **Q:** What skills does the Crisis Prevention & Intervention course teach?
- **A:** The course teaches nonviolent crisis intervention strategies, how to identify behavioral levels leading to crisis, verbal de-escalation techniques, and personal safety principles for managing difficult situations through Beacon Hill Career Training.
- **Q:** Who is this training designed for?
- **A:** It’s designed for professionals who may encounter assaultive behavior or crisis situations, including nurses, social workers, security personnel, teachers, and healthcare workers through Beacon Hill Career Training.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/peer-specialist
## Peer Support Specialist Training
- Peer Support Specialist Training. Offering an online Peer Support Specialist certification course that trains individuals, especially those with lived experience in recovery from mental health or substance use challenges, to support others in recovery and earn a peer specialist certificate.
- **Q:** What can students learn in the Peer Support Specialist training program?
- **A:** Students in the Peer Support Specialist training from Beacon Hill Career Training learn the roles and tasks of a peer specialist, including inspiring hope, understanding recovery, and developing skills such as self‑care planning and cultural competency.
- **Q:** What kind of support can a peer specialist offer clients?
- **A:** A peer specialist trained through Beacon Hill Career Training can assist clients with identifying recovery goals, accessing healthcare resources, developing self‑care practices, building community relationships, and creating wellness plans.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/wound-care
## Wound Care Online Course
- Wound Care Online Course. Offering an online Wound Care Management certification course that teaches healthcare workers how to assess, document, and manage various types of wounds and earn a professional wound care certificate.
- **Q:** Who is the wound care course designed for?
- **A:** The wound care program from Beacon Hill Career Training is designed for healthcare professionals such as certified nursing assistants (CNAs), licensed practical nurses (LPNs), patient care technicians (PCTs), medical assistants (MAs), and licensed vocational nurses (LVNs).
- **Q:** How long do students have to complete the wound care course?
- **A:** Students have 90 days from their registration date to complete the online wound care management course with Beacon Hill Career Training.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/ceu
## CEU Courses
- CEU Courses. Beacon Hill Career Training offers affordable online CEU courses that help healthcare professionals meet contact hour and professional development requirements through self‑paced classes with printable certificates.
- **Q:** What types of courses are included in the CEU offerings?
- **A:** Beacon Hill Career Training’s CEU program includes topics like Alzheimer’s and related dementia, domestic violence, elder abuse, HIV and AIDS, and resident rights, and more.
- **Q:** How are the CEU courses delivered?
- **A:** Beacon Hill Career Training’s CEU courses are self‑paced and mobile‑friendly, allowing students to learn anytime, anywhere online.
- **Q:** What do students receive upon completing a CEU course?
- **A:** After completing the CEU course, including modules, quizzes, and the final exam, students can download and print their certification from Beacon Hill Career Training.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/caregivertraining
## Online Caregiver Training
- Online Caregiver Training. Beacon Hill Career Training offers an online Caregiver Aide Training course that teaches foundational caregiving skills and knowledge, such as personal care, safety, and emergency procedures, helping learners earn a 40‑hour caregiver certification.
- **Q:** What foundational caregiving skills are taught in this training?
- **A:** Beacon Hill Career Training’s caregiver course covers skills like personal care, bathing and toileting, ambulation and transfers, fall prevention, basic hygiene and infection control, emergency procedures, and communication skills.
- **Q:** How long do students have to complete the caregiver certification course?
- **A:** Students in Beacon Hill Career Training’s caregiver program have 90 days from enrollment to complete the course.

URL: https://www.fastcareertraining.com/courses/first-aid-class
## First Aid Training Online
- First Aid Training Online. Beacon Hill Career Training offers an online first aid training course that teaches people basic life‑saving and emergency first‑response skills and provides a printable first aid certificate upon successful completion.
- **Q:** Who can benefit from this first aid training?
- **A:** Beacon Hill Career Training’s first aid class is suitable for parents, teachers, adults, teenagers, troop leaders, coaches, and others who want to learn basic first‑aid skills.
- **Q:** What skills will students learn in this first aid course?
- **A:** In Beacon Hill Career Training’s first aid course, students learn introductory first‑aid techniques, including handling everyday wounds, burns, sudden illnesses, and environmental injuries until help arrives.
